title: Add return type annotation to get_user_by_id
description: Adds the missing -> Optional[User] return type annotation to the get_user_by_id repository method for mypy strict mode compliance.
diff:
diff --git a/repositories/user_repo.py b/repositories/user_repo.py
index 4b5c6d7..e8f9a0b 100644
--- a/repositories/user_repo.py
+++ b/repositories/user_repo.py
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 from __future__ import annotations
 
-from typing import Any
+from typing import Any, Optional
 
 from models.user import User
 from database import get_session
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ from database import get_session
 
 class UserRepository:
 
-    def get_user_by_id(self, user_id: int):
+    def get_user_by_id(self, user_id: int) -> Optional[User]:
         '''Fetch a user by their primary key ID.'''
         session = get_session()
         return session.query(User).filter(User.id == user_id).first()
author: tom
